prompt: Download videos from this Bilibili channel: https://space.bilibili.com/123456789

assertions.name: includes_rate_limiting
assertions.description: Command should include --limit-rate to avoid bot detection

assertions.name: includes_archive
assertions.description: Command should include --download-archive for resume capability

assertions.name: correct_quality_format
assertions.description: Command should specify 1080p quality with merge format
assertions.check: Output contains -f flag with video+audio format specification
